html:
Exclusive to:  

The Ice Cube is a craftable Dress Item from the Reign of Giants DLC. It requires 2 Electrical Doodads, 4 Rope, and 10 Ice to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype.

When worn, the Ice Cube grants 240 points of protection from Overheating, and provides a cooling effect of 40°. Additionally, the player's Wetness will increase rapidly up to a maximum of 50 and walking speed will be reduced by 10%. The Ice Cube does not have durability, instead melting after 8 days, similar to the Ham Bat and Garland. That being said, it can be replenished with Ice, adding each time additional 0.4 days of durability.

Wearing the Ice Cube while playing as WX-78 will cause the player to take damage periodically.

Tips

  • Placing an Ice Cube in the Ice Box will completely stop it from melting.
  • The Ice Cube is good addition to the Thermal Stone near the Endothermic Fire Pit and/or in the Ice Box for long trips during Summer.
  • The Ice Cube will make inventory and equipped items Wet, causing Sanity loss. This can be used to become insane for farming Nightmare Fuel.
  • Even with maximum wetness, Maxwell will not lose any sanity, making this hat rather valuable for him during summer. That being said, the faster food spoilage and slippery weapons are still large downsides to using the Ice Cube for extended periods of time.
  • Dress Items with Wetness resistance, such as the Rain Coat, do not reduce wetness from the Ice Cube.
  • While wearing the Ice Cube, being near a fire will slowly get rid of player wetness and will prevent the player and the player's items from becoming wet.
  • It costs less Ice overall to just build a new Ice Cube than refueling an existing one with Ice, since the latter gives 0.8 days of durability per Ice instead of 0.4.
  • Storing important items in the Piggyback will prevent them from becoming wet.
  • Wurt does not lose sanity from the Ice Cube's Wetness.

Trivia

  • The description "Science, on the rocks." refers to the bartending terminology "On the rocks" for a drink served over ice cubes.

Bugs

  • Due to the way the game is coded, the Ice Cube also prevents freezing during Winter. This won't happen in Don't Starve Together.

Assets

  • dropped
  • equipped

Gallery

  • Ice Cube Equipped
  • Wilson wearing an Ice Cube.
  • Willow wearing an Ice Cube.
  • Wolfgang wearing an Ice Cube.
  • Wendy wearing an Ice Cube.
  • WX-78 wearing an Ice Cube.
  • Wickerbottom wearing an Ice Cube.
  • Woodie wearing an Ice Cube.
  • Wes wearing an Ice Cube.
  • Maxwell wearing an Ice Cube.
  • Wigfrid wearing an Ice Cube.
  • Webber wearing an Ice Cube.
  • Walani wearing an Ice Cube.
  • Warly wearing an Ice Cube.
  • Wilbur wearing an Ice Cube.
  • Woodlegs wearing an Ice Cube.
  • Wilba wearing an Ice Cube.
  • Wormwood wearing an Ice Cube.
  • Wheeler wearing an Ice Cube.
  • Winona wearing an Ice Cube.
  • Wortox wearing an Ice Cube.
  • Wurt wearing an Ice Cube.
  • Ice Cube as seen in the Summer promo for Reign of Giants.

“Stay cool, boy.”
–Wilson
“It's a real damper on my mood.”
–Willow
“Why put big ice on head?”
–Wolfgang
“Keep a cool head.”
–Wendy
“HAT SEEMS DANGEROUS TO MY FUNCTION”
–WX-78
“A perfect cube of ice.”
–Wickerbottom
“I could chop it if I had to.”
–Woodie
“Strap some ice to your head.”
–Maxwell
“Freezes the brain and lowers my internal body temperature.”
–Wagstaff
“A chunk öf cöld.”
–Wigfrid
“This should keep us cool.”
–Webber
“Keeps my head cold. And wet.”
–Walani
“Must I wear it?”
–Warly
“Keeps me 'ead cool.”
–Woodlegs
“WILBA HATH COLD BRAINS”
–Wilba
“Cool hat!”
–Wormwood
“Quite frankly, I don't care who sees me like this.”
–Wheeler
“There must be a more practical solution.”
–Winona
“Horns on ice!”
–Wortox
“This a very good hat.”
–Wurt
“There's got to be a better way to stay cool...”
–Walter
“Simple and effective.”
–Wanda
The Ice Cube is a craftable Dress Item from the Reign of Giants DLC. It requires 2 Electrical Doodads, 4 Rope, and 10 Ice to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype.
When worn, the Ice Cube grants 240 points of protection from Overheating, and provides a cooling effect of 40°. Additionally, the player's Wetness will increase rapidly up to a maximum of 50 and walking speed will be reduced by 10%. The Ice Cube does not have durability, instead melting after 8 days, similar to the Ham Bat and Garland. That being said, it can be replenished with Ice, adding each time additional 0.4 days of durability.
Wearing the Ice Cube while playing as WX-78 will cause the player to take damage periodically.
Tips[edit | edit source]
Placing an Ice Cube in the Ice Box will completely stop it from melting.
The Ice Cube is good addition to the Thermal Stone near the Endothermic Fire Pit and/or in the Ice Box for long trips during Summer.
The Ice Cube will make inventory and equipped items Wet, causing Sanity loss. This can be used to become insane for farming Nightmare Fuel.
Even with maximum wetness, Maxwell will not lose any sanity, making this hat rather valuable for him during summer. That being said, the faster food spoilage and slippery weapons are still large downsides to using the Ice Cube for extended periods of time.
Dress Items with Wetness resistance, such as the Rain Coat, do not reduce wetness from the Ice Cube.
While wearing the Ice Cube, being near a fire will slowly get rid of player wetness and will prevent the player and the player's items from becoming wet.
It costs less Ice overall to just build a new Ice Cube than refueling an existing one with Ice, since the latter gives 0.8 days of durability per Ice instead of 0.4.
Storing important items in the Piggyback will prevent them from becoming wet.
Wurt does not lose sanity from the Ice Cube's Wetness.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The description "Science, on the rocks." refers to the bartending terminology "On the rocks" for a drink served over ice cubes.
Bugs[edit | edit source]
Due to the way the game is coded, the Ice Cube also prevents freezing during Winter. This won't happen in Don't Starve Together.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Khối Băng là một Vật phẩm Trang phục có thể chế tạo được từ DLC Reign of Giants. Nó cần 2 Doodad Điện, 4 Dây Thừng và 10 Băng để chế tạo và Máy Luyện Kim để tạo nguyên mẫu.

It requires 2 [[Electrical Doodad]]s, 4 [[Rope]], and 10 [[Ice]] to craft and an [[Alchemy Engine]] to prototype. When worn, the Ice Cube grants 240 points of protection from [[Overheating]], and provides a cooling effect of 40°. Additionally, the player's [[Wetness]] will increase rapidly up to a maximum of 50 and walking speed will be reduced by 10%. The Ice Cube does not have durability, instead melting after 8 days, similar to the [[Ham Bat]] and [[Garland]]. That being said, it can be replenished with [[Ice]], adding each time additional 0.4 days of durability. Wearing the Ice Cube while playing as [[WX-78]] will cause the player to take damage periodically. == {{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips == * Placing an Ice Cube in the [[Ice Box]] will completely stop it from melting. * The Ice Cube is good addition to the [[Thermal Stone]] near the [[Endothermic Fire Pit]] and/or in the Ice Box for long trips during [[Seasons/Summer|Summer]]. * The Ice Cube will make inventory and equipped items [[Wetness|Wet]], causing [[Sanity]] loss. This can be used to become insane for farming [[Nightmare Fuel]]. * Even with maximum wetness, [[Maxwell/Character|Maxwell]] will not lose ''any'' sanity, making this hat rather valuable for him during summer. That being said, the faster food spoilage and slippery weapons are still large downsides to using the Ice Cube for extended periods of time. * [[Dress]] Items with Wetness resistance, such as the [[Rain Coat]], do not reduce wetness from the Ice Cube. * While wearing the Ice Cube, being near a fire will slowly get rid of player wetness and will prevent the player and the player's items from becoming wet. * It costs less Ice overall to just build a new Ice Cube than refueling an existing one with Ice, since the latter gives 0.8 days of durability per Ice instead of 0.4. * Storing important items in the [[Piggyback]] will prevent them from becoming wet. * Wurt does not lose sanity from the Ice Cube's Wetness. == {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia == *The description "Science, on the rocks." refers to the bartending terminology "On the rocks" for a drink served over ice cubes. == {{Pic32|Mosquito}} Bugs == * Due to the way the game is coded, the Ice Cube also prevents freezing during [[Winter]].
